Name: Street Fighter 6
Description: Capcom'un efsanevi dövüş oyunu serisi - SF6

Characters.Name: Zangief Modern
Characters.Description: Kızıl Siklon - Modern kontroller ile basitleştirilmiş combo'lar

Combos.Name: Assisted Combo 1
Combos.Description: Hafif saldırı combo - Z + Assist + X → X → X

Combos.Name: Rapid Cancel Assisted Combo
Combos.Description: Hızlı iptal combo - ↓ + Z + Assist + X → X → X

Combos.Name: Assisted Combo 2
Combos.Description: Orta saldırı combo - Z + Assist + S → S → S

Combos.Name: Assisted Combo 3
Combos.Description: Güçlü saldırı combo - Z + Assist + D → D → D

Characters.Name: Ryu Modern
Characters.Description: Hadoken ustası - Cancel Drive Rush ile etkili combo'lar

Combos.Name: Cancel Drive Rush Combo
Combos.Description: Hadoken → Cancel Drive Rush → Assisted Combo → Shoryuken

Combos.Name: Parry Counter Combo
Combos.Description: Drive Parry → Parry Drive Rush → Assisted Combo 2 → Super

Combos.Name: Pressure Combo
Combos.Description: Drive Impact → Assisted Combo 1 → Cancel Drive Rush → Tatsumaki

Combos.Name: Advanced Rush Down
Combos.Description: Rapid Cancel → Drive Rush → Shoryuken → Shin Shoryuken

Characters.Name: Zangief Modern
Characters.Description: Red Cyclone - Güreş ve grappling ustası

Combos.Name: Screw Piledriver
Combos.Description: ↓ or → + W - Dönen pile driver

Combos.Name: Russian Suplex
Combos.Description: ← + W - Rus supleksi

Combos.Name: Double Lariat
Combos.Description: ↓ + W - Çift kol dönüşü

Combos.Name: Aerial Russian Slam
Combos.Description: ↓ or → + W + D - Havadan Rus çarpması (Super Art 1)

Combos.Name: Cyclone Lariat
Combos.Description: ← + W + D - Kasırga lariat (Super Art 2)

Combos.Name: Bolshoi Storm Buster
Combos.Description: ↓ + W + D - Büyük fırtına (Super Art 3)

Combos.Name: Cancel Drive Rush
Combos.Description: → → or (W or →) + A - Cancel Drive Rush

Combos.Name: Assisted Combo 1
Combos.Description: Z + 🎮 + M → M → M

Characters.Name: Chun-Li Modern
Characters.Description: Yüz Tekme Kraliçesi - Modern kontroller ile Serenity Stream combo'ları

Combos.Name: Intermediate 8: Serenity Stream Chain
Combos.Description: ↓ + S → ← + D → ↓ ↙ ← + M → (Serenity) ↑ + M → ↓ ↑ + M S → N + W D

Combos.Name: Beginner 4: Jump Combo Chain
Combos.Description: (During a jump) D → Z ↓ + S × 6

Combos.Name: Beginner 8: Serenity Stream Juggle
Combos.Description: ↓ ↙ ← + M → (Serenity) ↑ + D → ↓ + S × 3 → W

Combo.Name: Advanced Rush Down
Combo.Description: Rapid Cancel → Drive Rush → Shoryuken → Shin Shoryuken

Characters.Name: Ryu Modern
Characters.Description: Hadoken Ustası - Modern kontroller ile Denjin Charge combo'ları

Combos.Name: Advanced 4: Denjin Charge Combo
Combos.Description: ↓ ↓ + M → ↑ + S → ↓ ↙ ← + M S (Buffed) → ← + W D (Hold) → → + W

Combos.Name: Assisted Combo 1
Combos.Description: Z ↙ + M ▶ M

Combos.Name: Rapid Cancel Assisted Combo
Combos.Description: ↓ + Z ↙ + M ▶ M ▶ M (During rapid cancel)

Combos.Name: Assisted Combo 2
Combos.Description: Z ↙ + S ▶ S ▶ S

Combos.Name: Assisted Combo 3
Combos.Description: Z ↙ + D ▶ D ▶ D

Combo.Name: Advanced 4: Denjin Charge Combo
Combo.Description: ↓ ↓ + M → ↑ + S → ↓ ↙ ← + M S (Buffed) → ← + W D (Hold) → → + W

Combo.Name: Advanced 4: Denjin Charge Combo
Combo.Description: ↓ ↓ + M → ↑ + S → ↓ ↙ ← + M S (Buffed) → ← + W D (Hold) → → + W

Combo.Name: Advanced 4: Denjin Charge Combo
Combo.Description: ↓ ↓ + M → ↑ + S → ↓ ↙ ← + M S (Buffed) → ← + W D (Hold) → → + W

Combo.Name: Advanced 4: Denjin Charge Combo
Combo.Description: ↓ ↓ + M → ↑ + S → ↓ ↙ ← + M S (Buffed) → ← + W D (Hold) → → + W

Name: EA Sports FC 26
Description: EA Sports futbol simülasyonu - Şut ve skill combo'ları

Characters.Name: Şut Combo'ları
Characters.Description: Plase, Sert Şut ve Trivela teknikleri

Combos.Name: Plase Şut (Finesse Shot)
Combos.Description: R basılı tut → D tap → R bırak - Köşeye yerleştirme şutu

Combos.Name: Sert Şut (Power Shot)
Combos.Description: Q + R + D aynı anda - Güçlü ve hassas şut

Combos.Name: Trivela
Combos.Description: Z + D - Dış ayak şutu (Quaresma tarzı)
